legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is legal in Thailand / ประเทศไทย. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is restricted. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is legal in Thailand / ประเทศไทย. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is restricted. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Thailand}} Criminalized in 1935, medical use legalized in 2018. Recreational use legalized in 2022 for those aged 20 and over. Unprescribed products with over 0.2% THC were recriminalized in 2025, but this law is often unenforced.<ref>{{cite news |last= Bush |first= Austin |date= 30 August 2022 |title= Cannabis is now legal in Thailand, but it's complicated: what travelers need to know |url= https://www.lonelyplanet.com/news/thailand-cannabis-guide |work= Lonely Planet |access-date= 24 June 2023}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=2025-06-25 |title=Country bans recreational cannabis again in major blow to tourism |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/asia/southeast-asia/thailand-cannabis-illegal-law-b2776598.html |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=The Independent |language=en}}</ref>
